settings.heading: Shipping & Delivery
settings.subheading: AmiriVibes offers flexible delivery options for customers in Qatar, the UAE, the GCC, and international destinations.

settings.title: LOCAL ORDERS
settings.intro: All orders placed within Qatar are fulfilled from local stock, ensuring fast availability and minimal wait times.
settings.bullets: Same-day delivery is available for orders confirmed before the daily cut-off time.||Orders confirmed after the cut-off are dispatched the following business day.||Delivery timelines are displayed before checkout — you will always know when to expect your order before you confirm.

settings.title: PERSONAL SHOPPING
settings.intro: Personal Shopping is our dedicated service for clients looking to source a specific product. Simply get in touch with our customer care team, share what you are looking for, and we will take it from there.
settings.bullets: Contact our team via WhatsApp with the product details — style, size, and any preferences.||Once confirmed and available, payment is collected in full via Bank Transfer before sourcing begins.||Estimated delivery is 15 to 18 working days from the date payment is confirmed.||Delivery timelines are communicated clearly before you commit to your order.||If we are unable to source the requested product, a full refund will be issued promptly with no deductions.||All Personal Shopping requests are handled exclusively via WhatsApp to ensure every detail is confirmed accurately before processing begins.
